message:
feat(embed): add cloud API embedding provider abstraction for OpenAI and Gemini

Introduce a new ModelCategory::ApiEmbedder variant and the "api" feature
flag that enables cloud-hosted embedding via provider-agnostic HTTP calls.

- Add ApiProvider trait in api_provider.rs defining the contract for cloud
  embedding APIs: endpoint URL, auth headers, request serialization,
  response deserialization, batch limits, and MRL support
- Implement OpenAiProvider (text-embedding-3-small/large with MRL
  dimension truncation) and GeminiProvider (text-embedding-004)
- Map ApiEmbedder to ModelTier::Quality and EmbedderTier::Quality in
  the fusion searcher, treating cloud embeddings as quality-tier alongside
  local transformer models
- Gate all API code behind the "api" feature flag; include it in the
  "full" feature set for convenience
- Wire TLS dependencies (asupersync/tls + webpki-roots) for HTTPS calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -20,11 +20,12 @@ rerank = ["dep:frankensearch-rerank", "frankensearch-fusion/rerank"]
 fastembed-reranker = ["rerank", "frankensearch-rerank/fastembed-reranker"]
 ann = ["frankensearch-index/ann"]
 download = ["frankensearch-embed/download"]
+api = ["frankensearch-embed/api"]
 semantic = ["hash", "model2vec", "fastembed"]
 hybrid = ["semantic", "lexical"]
 persistent = ["hybrid", "storage"]
 durable = ["persistent", "durability"]
-full = ["durable", "rerank", "ann", "download", "graph"]
+full = ["durable", "rerank", "ann", "download", "graph", "api"]
 full-fts5 = ["full", "fts5"]
 
 [dependencies]
